action.reasoning: Observation: Iter1 ResNet50 baseline gets balanced_accuracy=0.363 on L100 (vs val_acc=0.90), with 0.0 on bird/squirrel and low on several others. Analysis: Severe domain shift (backgrounds/lighting/species diffs); lacks aug, class balancing, robust backbone, and sufficient training for generalization. CLIP-ViT likely helps due to diverse pretraining. Decision: Switch to timm vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai (86M params), add RandCrop/Flip/Jitter + CLIP norm in train, CenterCrop in val/test, class-weighted loss, AdamW+cosine scheduler, 10 epochs, best-val checkpointing, improved logging. Submit eval immediately after to track progress within budgets (~5min/iter est.).
